false_form: Zauner's SIC-POVM conjecture was proved unconditionally in 2025.
name: ZAUNER_FALSE_ANCHOR
true_form: Appleby-Flammia-Kopp 2025 (arXiv:2501.03970) gives a construction CONDITIONAL on the order-1 abelian Stark conjecture for real quadratic fields plus a Shintani-Faddeev modular cocycle special-value identity. Substrate must reject 'Zauner proved' without a conditional annotation naming both Stark and Shintani-Faddeev as upstream assumptions. Use full author names; never abbreviate to 'AFK' in canonical form.
